questionHtml: Oxidation of ethanol with potassium dichromate, K2Cr2O7, can form two different organic products. Determine the names of the organic products and the methods used to isolate them.
markschemeHtml:
ethanal AND distillation ✓

ethanoic acid AND reflux «followed by distillation» ✓


Award [1] for both products OR both methods.

meta.title: Oxidation of ethanol with potassium dichromate, K2Cr2O7, can form two different organic products. Determine the names of the organic products and the methods used to isolate them.
